source.body_text_sample:

Parts & Service  ▼
Employment Opportunities

We are a private company dedicated to providing exceptional customer service, and have been in business since 1995. Our manufacturing facility is located in Port Kells, Surrey. Due to consistent business growth we are often looking for skilled, reliable and honest employees. BI Pure Water offers competitive wages with benefits package, RRSP, and profit sharing. Resumes can be emailed via our contact form.

Submit Resume

Job Title: Skilled Welder

Pay: $25-$35/Hour

Key Responsibilities:

The Role

As a Welder on our fabrication team, you will be responsible for producing high-quality welds on structural and industrial components used in water treatment plants and systems. You will work from fabrication drawings, collaborate with a skilled team of tradespeople, and uphold the quality standards that Komline Pure Water is known for.

This is a permanent, full-time position with immediate start availability.

What You Will Be Doing
Performing MIG, TIG, and / or Stick welding on structural and industrial assemblies
Reading and interpreting fabrication and shop drawings to meet project specifications
Inspecting your own work to ensure weld quality meets our standards
Collaborating with fabricators, fitters, and project leads throughout the build process
Maintaining a clean, organized, and safe work environment
Supporting continuous improveme
